title: Sunset Cruise + Galata Bridge Walk
note: Best photo window is golden hour from the ferry deck.

title: Grand Bazaar + Spice Bazaar
note: Shopping, snacks, and local products in Eminonu area.

title: Galata / Istiklal / Taksim Walk
note: Use Tunel funicular to skip the steep uphill section.

title: Riverside Sunset Walk
note: Low-effort first-night activity after check-in and recovery.

title: Wat Arun + Wat Pho Cluster
note: Do temples early before humidity and crowds peak.

title: Mahanakhon Skywalk
note: Best booked for golden hour and sunset skyline.

title: Khlong / Canal Segment
note: Practical and scenic way to bypass heavy road traffic.

title: Chinatown or Banthat Thong Food Night
note: Pick one area and enjoy it deeply instead of crossing zones.

title: Ayutthaya Historic Core
note: Prioritize Wat Mahathat and Wat Phra Si Sanphet.
